mapper.select: SELECT id FROM hashtags WHERE tag = #{tag} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM hashtags WHERE tag = #{tag} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hashtags (tag) VALUES (#{tag}) ON CONFLICT (tag) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE hashtags SET post_count = post_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hashtags SET post_count = GREATEST(post_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_hashtags (post_id, hashtag_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{hashtagId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT hashtag_id FROM post_hashtags WHERE post_id = #{postId}
